task_completion.description: Load the input polygon and point layers into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layers panel shows 'sample_polygon' and 'sample_points' loaded into the project.

task_completion.description: Ensure the analysis is performed using EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reproject Layer' dialog is used with EPSG:32610 selected, OR the project/layer CRS indicator (usually bottom right) shows EPSG:32610, OR the export/processing dialogs explicitly show EPSG:32610 as the target CRS.

task_completion.description: Create 1000-meter buffer zones around the radar station points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Buffer' tool dialog is visible with the input layer set to the points and distance set to 1000 (meters), OR a new layer appears on the map canvas showing circular areas around the points.

task_completion.description: Perform a difference (overlay) operation to exclude the restricted buffer zones from the land parcels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Difference' tool dialog is visible with the polygons as the Input layer and the buffers as the Overlay layer, OR the map canvas shows the resulting polygons with circular holes cut out of them.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting developable areas to the specified GeoJSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the format as GeoJSON and the file name/path as '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/developable_areas.geojson', OR a success message indicates this specific file was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface (GUI) to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, the Processing Toolbox, and dialog windows, rather than relying solely on terminal commands (e.g., ogr2ogr or gdal) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually computed the geometric difference rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the intermediate buffer layer and the final difference layer on the map canvas, showing polygons with actual circular cutouts.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS 'Save Vector Layer as' dialog is used to generate the final GeoJSON, rather than a text editor or terminal script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Inputs: /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson (2 rectangular polygons) and /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson (3 points). Target CRS: EPSG:32610 (UTM Zone 10N). Buffer distance: 1000 meters. Operation: Difference (Polygons minus Buffers). Output: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/developable_areas.geojson in GeoJSON format. The final visual result should show the original polygons with circular holes (1000m radius) removed around the point locations.
